name: Silo Wellness Inc.
summary: FlyOverture Equity Inc. doing business as Silo Wellness, engages in producing plant and fungal-based compounds for natural wellness. It offers psilocybin nasal spray made from cannabis. FlyOverture Equity Inc. was formerly known as Eighteen Fifty Equity, Inc. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Springfield, Oregon.
